_comment: Drives the npx installer. Each entry copies a source dir from the repo (at the pinned ref) into the consuming repo. 'wire: true' = one-time manual setup needed (the installer prints a note, never auto-merges build config).

shared.wire: Merge justfile.snippet into your root justfile (gives `just check`). No wiring for autonomy: rules/agent/autonomy.md installs to .claude/rules/agent/ and auto-loads every session.

rust.wire: Merge lefthook.snippet.yml into lefthook.yml (default fmt = portable `cargo fmt --all`); move deny.toml→workspace root, mutants.toml→.cargo/, mutation-ci.yaml→.gitea/workflows/. rust-fmt.sh is a SPECIAL CASE (bash) — only if you have a generated member crate to skip; add #![allow(clippy::all)] to that crate too. See .claude/kit/README.md.

ts.wire: Merge lefthook.snippet.yml into lefthook.yml; adapt eslint.config.base.js globalIgnores into your eslint config.

go.wire: Move golangci.base.yml→.golangci.yml; merge lefthook.snippet.yml into lefthook.yml.

architecture._note: Opt-in — NOT bundled with a language profile. Rules are path-scoped (cqrs→rs, hexagonal→rs/go, frontend-flat→ts/tsx), so they load only on matching files. Add explicitly: `add rust architecture`.
